verses.geez:
ወኢትግበሩ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ግብረ ፡ እደ ፡ ሰብእ ፡ ወኢግልፎ ፡ ወኢታቅሙ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ሐውልተ ፡ እብን ፡ በውስተ ፡ ምድርክሙ
                  ፡ ከመ ፡ ትስግዱ ፡ ላቲ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ።

translations.lxx: I am the Lord your God: ye shall not make to yourselves gods made with hands, or graven; neither shall ye rear up a pillar for yourselves, neither shall ye set up a stone for an object in your land to worship it: I am the Lord your God.
translations.kjv: Ye shall make you no idols nor graven image, neither rear you up a standing image, neither shall ye set up any image of stone in your land, to bow down unto it: for I am the LORD your God.

verses.geez: ወዕቀቡ ፡ ሰንበትየ ፡ ወፍርሁ ፡ እምነ ፡ ቅዱሳንየ ፡ እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall keep my sabbaths, and reverence my sanctuaries: I am the Lord.
translations.kjv: Ye shall keep my sabbaths, and reverence my sanctuary: I am the LORD.

verses.geez: ለእመ ፡ ሖርክሙ ፡ በትእዛዝየ ፡ ወዐቀብክሙ ፡ ኵነኔየ ፡ ወገበርክምዎ ፤

translations.lxx: If ye will walk in my ordinances, and keep my commandments, and do them,
translations.kjv: If ye walk in my statutes, and keep my commandments, and do them;

verses.geez: እሁበክሙ ፡ ዝናመ ፡ በዘመኑ ፡ ወምድርኒ ፡ ትሁብ ፡ እክላ ፡ ወዕፀወ ፡ ገዳምኒ ፡ ይሁብ ፡ ፍሬሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: then will I give you the rain in its season, and the land shall produce its fruits, and the trees of the field shall yield their fruit.
translations.kjv: Then I will give you rain in due season, and the land shall yield her increase, and the trees of the field shall yield their fruit.

verses.geez:
ወይትራከብ ፡ ማእረር ፡ ምስለ ፡ ቀሥም ፡ ወቀሢምኒ ፡ ይትራከብ ፡ ለዘርእ ፡ ወትበልዑ ፡ እክለክሙ ፡ ለጽጋብ ፡ ወትነብሩ
                  ፡ እንዘ ፡ ትትአመኑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And your threshing time shall overtake the vintage, and your vintage shall overtake your seed time; and ye shall eat your bread to the full; and ye shall dwell safely upon your land, and war shall not go through your land.
translations.kjv: And your threshing shall reach unto the vintage, and the vintage shall reach unto the sowing time: and ye shall eat your bread to the full, and dwell in your land safely.

verses.geez:
ወእሁበክሙ ፡ ሰላመ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድርክሙ ፡ ወትነውሙ ፡ ወአልቦ ፡ ዘያደነግፀክሙ ፡ ወአጠፍኦሙ ፡ ለአራዊተ ፡ ምድር ፡
                  እምነ ፡ ብሔርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And I will give peace in your land, and ye shall sleep, and none shall make you afraid; and I will destroy the evil beasts out of your land,
translations.kjv: And I will give peace in the land, and ye shall lie down, and none shall make you afraid: and I will rid evil beasts out of the land, neither shall the sword go through your land.

verses.geez: ወትቀትልዎሙ ፡ [ለፀርክሙ ፡] ወይመውቱ ፡ በቅድሜክሙ ።

translations.lxx: and ye shall pursue your enemies, and they shall fall before you with slaughter.
translations.kjv: And ye shall chase your enemies, and they shall fall before you by the sword.

verses.geez:
ወኃምስቱ ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ያነትዕዎሙ ፡ ለምእት ፡ ወምእት ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ያነትዕዎሙ ፡ ለእልፍ ፡ ወይወድቁ ፡ ጸላእትክሙ ፡
                  በቅድሜክሙ ፡ በኀፂን ።

translations.lxx: And five of you shall chase a hundred, and a hundred of you shall chase tens of thousands; and your enemies shall fall before you by the sword.
translations.kjv: And five of you shall chase an hundred, and an hundred of you shall put ten thousand to flight: and your enemies shall fall before you by the sword.

verses.geez: ወእኔጽር ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ ወኣዐብየክሙ ፡ ወኣበዝኀክሙ ፡ ወኣቀውም ፡ ኪዳንየ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And I will look upon you, and increase you, and multiply you, and establish my covenant with you.
translations.kjv: For I will have respect unto you, and make you fruitful, and multiply you, and establish my covenant with you.

verses.geez: ወትበልዑ ፡ ከራሜ ፡ ወከራሜ ፡ ከራሚ ፡ ወታወፅኡ ፡ ከራሜ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታብኡ ፡ ሐዲሰ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall eat that which is old and very old, and bring forth the old to make way for the new.
translations.kjv: And ye shall eat old store, and bring forth the old because of the new.

verses.geez: ወእተክል ፡ ማኅደርየ ፡ ኀቤክሙ ፡ ወኢታስቆርረክሙ ፡ ነፍስየ ።

translations.lxx: And I will set my tabernacle among you, and my soul shall not abhor you;
translations.kjv: And I will set my tabernacle among you: and my soul shall not abhor you.

verses.geez: ወኣንሶሱ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ወእከውነክሙ ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ወአንትሙኒ ፡ ትከውኑኒ ፡ ሕዝብየ ።

translations.lxx: and I will walk among you, and be your God, and ye shall be my people.
translations.kjv: And I will walk among you, and will be your God, and ye shall be my people.

verses.geez:
እስመ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ዘአውፃእኩክሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እንዘ ፡ አግብርት ፡ አንትሙ ፡
                  ወሰበርኩ ፡ መዋቅሕቲክሙ ፡ ወአውፃእኩክሙ ፡ ገሃደ ።

translations.lxx: I am the Lord your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt, where ye were slaves; and I broke the band of your yoke, and brought you forth openly.
translations.kjv: I am the LORD your God, which brought you forth out of the land of Egypt, that ye should not be their bondmen; and I have broken the bands of your yoke, and made you go upright.

verses.geez: ወእመሰ ፡ ኢሰማዕክሙኒ ፡ ወኢገበርክሙ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፤

translations.lxx: But if ye will not hearken to me, nor obey these my ordinances,
translations.kjv: But if ye will not hearken unto me, and will not do all these commandments;

verses.geez:
አላ ፡ ክሕድክሙ ፡ ወተቈጥዐት ፡ ነፍስክሙ ፡ ኵነኔየ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢትግበሩ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ትኅድጉ ፡
                  ሥርዐትየ ፤

translations.lxx: but disobey them, and your soul should loathe my judgments, so that ye should not keep all my commands, so as to break my covenant,
translations.kjv: And if ye shall despise my statutes, or if your soul abhor my judgments, so that ye will not do all my commandments, but that ye break my covenant:

verses.geez:
ወአነኒ ፡ ከማሁ ፡ እገብረክሙ ፡ ወኣመጽኣ ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ ለእኪት ፡ ዐበቀ ፡ ወደዌ ፡ ሲሕ ፡ ወዘይዴጕጸክሙ ፡
                  አዕይንቲክሙ ፡ ወትትመሰው ፡ ነፍስክሙ ፡ ወትዘርኡ ፡ ለከንቱ ፡ ዘርአክሙ ፡ ወይበልዑክሙ ፡ ፀርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: then will I do thus to you: I will even bring upon you perplexity and the itch, and the fever that causes your eyes to waste away, and disease that consumes your life; and ye shall sow your seeds in vain, and your enemies shall eat them.
translations.kjv: I also will do this unto you; I will even appoint over you terror, consumption, and the burning ague, that shall consume the eyes, and cause sorrow of heart: and ye shall sow your seed in vain, for your enemies shall eat it.

verses.geez:
ወኣቀውም ፡ ገጽየ ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ ወትወድቁ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ፀርክሙ ፡ ወያነትዑክሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይጸልዑክሙ ፡ ወትነትዑ ፡ እንዘ
                  ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዘይዴግነክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And I will set my face against you, and ye shall fall before your enemies, and they that hate you shall pursue you; and ye shall flee, no one pursuing you.
translations.kjv: And I will set my face against you, and ye shall be slain before your enemies: they that hate you shall reign over you; and ye shall flee when none pursueth you.

verses.geez: ወእመ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዝንቱኒ ፡ ኢሰማዕክሙኒ ፡ ወእዌስክ ፡ መቅሠፍተክሙ ፡ ሰባዕተ ፡ መቅሠፍተ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጣይኢክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And if ye still refuse to hearken to me, then will I chasten you yet more even seven times for your sins.
translations.kjv: And if ye will not yet for all this hearken unto me, then I will punish you seven times more for your sins.

verses.geez: ወእሰብር ፡ ፅእለተ ፡ ትዕቢትክሙ ፡ ወእሬስያ ፡ ለክሙ ፡ ለሰማይ ፡ ከመ ፡ ኀፂን ፡ ወለምድርኒ ፡ ከመ ፡ ብርት ።

translations.lxx: And I will break down the haughtiness of your pride; and I will make your heaven iron, and your earth as it were brass.
translations.kjv: And I will break the pride of your power; and I will make your heaven as iron, and your earth as brass:

verses.geez: ወይከውን ፡ ለከንቱ ፡ ኀይልክሙ ፡ ወኢትሁበክሙ ፡ ምድር ፡ ዘርኣ ፡ ወዕፀ ፡ ገዳምኒ ፡ ኢይሁበክሙ ፡ ፍሬሁ ።

translations.lxx: And your strength shall be in vain; and your land shall not yield its seed, and the tree of your field shall not yield its fruit.
translations.kjv: And your strength shall be spent in vain: for your land shall not yield her increase, neither shall the trees of the land yield their fruits.

verses.geez:
ወእመኒ ፡ እምድኅረ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ሖርክሙ ፡ ግድመ ፡ ወኢፈቀድክሙ ፡ ትስምዑኒ ፡ እዌስከክሙ ፡ ፯መቅሠፍተ ፡ በከመ ፡
                  ኀጣይኢክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And if after this ye should walk perversely, and not be willing to obey me, I will further bring upon you seven plagues according to your sins.
translations.kjv: And if ye walk contrary unto me, and will not hearken unto me; I will bring seven times more plagues upon you according to your sins.

verses.geez:
ወእፌኑ ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ አራዊተ ፡ ምድር ፡ እኩየ ፡ ወይበልዑክሙ ፡ ወያጠፍኡ ፡ እንስሳክሙ ፡ ወውሑዳነ ፡ ያተርፉክሙ ፡
                  ወበድወ ፡ ይሬስዩ ፡ ፍናዌክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And I will send upon you the wild beasts of the land, and they shall devour you, and shall consume your cattle: and I will make you few in number, and your ways shall be desolate.
translations.kjv: I will also send wild beasts among you, which shall rob you of your children, and destroy your cattle, and make you few in number; and your high ways shall be desolate.

verses.geez: ወእመኒ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ኢፈራህክሙ ፡ አላ ፡ ሖርክሙ ፡ ግድመ ፡ ምስሌየ ፤

translations.lxx: And if hereupon ye are not corrected, but walk perversely towards me,
translations.kjv: And if ye will not be reformed by me by these things, but will walk contrary unto me;

verses.geez: አሐውር ፡ አነኒ ፡ በመዐት ፡ ግድመ ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ ወእቀትለክሙ ፡ አነኒ ፡ ምስብዒተ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጣይኢክሙ ።

translations.lxx: I also will walk with you with a perverse spirit, and I also will smite you seven times for your sins.
translations.kjv: Then will I also walk contrary unto you, and will punish you yet seven times for your sins.

verses.geez:
ወኣመጽእ ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ መጥባኅተ ፡ እንተ ፡ ትዴግነክሙ ፡ ወትትቤቀለክሙ ፡ በቀለ ፡ ኪዳንየ ፡ ወትጐይዩ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  አህጉሪክሙ ፡ ወእፌኑ ፡ ሞተ ፡ ላዕሌክሙ ፡ ወትገብኡ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደ ፡ ፀርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And I will bring upon you a sword avenging the cause of my covenant, and ye shall flee for refuge to your cities; and I will send out death against you, and ye shall be delivered into the hands of your enemies.
translations.kjv: And I will bring a sword upon you, that shall avenge the quarrel of my covenant: and when ye are gathered together within your cities, I will send the pestilence among you; and ye shall be delivered into the hand of the enemy.

verses.geez:
ሶበ ፡ አሕመመክሙ ፡ ኀጣአ ፡ እክል ፡ ዘትሴስዩ ፡ ወያበስላ ፡ ዓሥሩ ፡ አንስት ፡ ኅብስተክሙ ፡ በአሐዱ ፡ እቶን ፡
                  ወይሁባክሙ ፡ ኅብስተክሙ ፡ በመድሎት ፡ ወትበልዑ ፡ ወኢትጸግቡ ።

translations.lxx: When I afflict you with famine of bread, then ten women shall bake your loaves in one oven, and they shall render your loaves by weight; and ye shall eat, and not be satisfied.
translations.kjv: And when I have broken the staff of your bread, ten women shall bake your bread in one oven, and they shall deliver you your bread again by weight: and ye shall eat, and not be satisfied.

verses.geez: ወእመኒ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ ኢሰማዕክሙኒ ፡ አላ ፡ ሖርክሙ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ግድመ ፤

translations.lxx: And if hereupon ye will not obey me, but walk perversely towards me,
translations.kjv: And if ye will not for all this hearken unto me, but walk contrary unto me;

verses.geez: ወአነኒ ፡ አሐውር ፡ ምስሌክሙ ፡ በመዐት ፡ ግድመ ፡ ወእቀሥፈክሙ ፡ አነኒ ፡ በምስብዒት ፡ በከመ ፡ ኀጣይኢክሙ ።

translations.lxx: then will I walk with you with a froward mind, and I will chasten you sevenfold according to your sins.
translations.kjv: Then I will walk contrary unto you also in fury; and I, even I, will chastise you seven times for your sins.

verses.geez: ወትበልዑ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ ደቂቅክሙ ፡ ወትበልዑ ፡ ሥጋ ፡ አዋልዲክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall eat the flesh of your sons, and the flesh of your daughters shall ye eat.
translations.kjv: And ye shall eat the flesh of your sons, and the flesh of your daughters shall ye eat.

verses.geez:
ወእደመስስ ፡ ም[ሰሊ]ክሙ ፡ ወእሤሩ ፡ ግብረ ፡ እደዊክሙ ፡ ለዕፀው ፡ ወእዘሩ ፡ አብድንቲክሙ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ምስለ ፡
                  አማልክቲክሙ ፡ ወትትቌጥዐክሙ ፡ ነፍስየ ።

translations.lxx: And I will render your pillars desolate, and will utterly destroy your wooden images made with hands; and I will lay your carcases on the carcases of your idols, and my soul shall loathe you.
translations.kjv: And I will destroy your high places, and cut down your images, and cast your carcases upon the carcases of your idols, and my soul shall abhor you.

verses.geez: ወእገብሮን ፡ ለአህጉሪክሙ ፡ መዝብረ ፡ ወእደመስስ ፡ ቅድሳቲክሙ ፡ ወኢያጼኑ ፡ መዐዛ ፡ መሥዋዕቲክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And I will lay your cities waste, and I will make your sanctuaries desolate, and I will not smell the savour of your sacrifices.
translations.kjv: And I will make your cities waste, and bring your sanctuaries unto desolation, and I will not smell the savour of your sweet odours.

verses.geez: ወእሬስያ ፡ አነ ፡ ለምድርክሙ ፡ በድወ ፡ ወይደመሙ ፡ በእንቲአሃ ፡ ፀርክሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ይነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: And I will lay your land desolate, and your enemies who dwell in it shall wonder at it.
translations.kjv: And I will bring the land into desolation: and your enemies which dwell therein shall be astonished at it.

verses.geez:
ወእዘርወክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ ወአጠፍአክሙ ፡ በኀበ ፡ ሖርክሙ ፡ በመጥባሕት ፡ ወትከውን ፡ ምድርክሙ ፡ በድወ ፡
                  ወአህጉሪክሙ ፡ ይከውን ፡ መዝብረ ።

translations.lxx: And I will scatter you among the nations, and the sword shall come upon you and consume you; and your land shall be desolate, and your cities shall be desolate.
translations.kjv: And I will scatter you among the heathen, and will draw out a sword after you: and your land shall be desolate, and your cities waste.

verses.geez:
ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ይኤድማ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ሰናብቲሃ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ሙስናሃ ፡ ወአንትሙኒ ፡ ትሄልዉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ
                  ፡ ጸላእትክሙ ፡ ወይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ታሰነብት ፡ ምድር ፡ ወይኤድማ ፡ ለምድር ፡ ሰናብቲሃ ፡ በኵሉ ፡ መዋዕለ ፡ ሙስናሃ ።

translations.lxx: Then the land shall enjoy its sabbaths all the days of its desolation.
translations.kjv: Then shall the land enjoy her sabbaths, as long as it lieth desolate, and ye be in your enemies’ land; even then shall the land rest, and enjoy her sabbaths.

verses.geez: ወታሰነብት ፡ ከመ ፡ ኢአሰንበተት ፡ በሰንበትክሙ ፡ አመ ፡ ሀለውክሙ ፡ ትነብሩ ፡ ውስቴታ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall be in the land of your enemies; then the land shall keep its sabbaths, and the land shall enjoy its sabbaths all the days of its desolation: it shall keep sabbaths which it kept not among your sabbaths, when ye dwelt in it.
translations.kjv: As long as it lieth desolate it shall rest; because it did not rest in your sabbaths, when ye dwelt upon it.

verses.geez:
ወለእለ ፡ ተርፉኒ ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ኣመጽእ ፡ ድንጋፄ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ልቦሙ ፡ በምድረ ፡ [ፀሮ]ሙ ፡ ወይሜምዑ ፡ እምድምፀ ፡
                  ቈጽል ፡ ዘይትሐወስ ፡ ወይነትዑ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘይነትዕ ፡ እምፀር ፡ ወይወድቁ ፡ እንዘ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዘይዴግኖሙ ።

translations.lxx: And to those who are left of you I will bring bondage into their heart in the land of their enemies; and the sound of a shaken leaf shall chase them, and they shall flee as fleeing from war, and shall fall when none pursues them.
translations.kjv: And upon them that are left alive of you I will send a faintness into their hearts in the lands of their enemies; and the sound of a shaken leaf shall chase them; and they shall flee, as fleeing from a sword; and they shall fall when none pursueth.

verses.geez:
ወይትዔወሮ ፡ ብእሲ ፡ ለእኁሁ ፡ ከመ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ ቀትል ፡ እንዘ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዘይዴግኖሙ ፡ ወኢትክሉ ፡ ተቃውሞቶሙ ፡
                  ለፀርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And brother shall disregard brother as in war, when none pursues; and ye shall not be able to withstand your enemies.
translations.kjv: And they shall fall one upon another, as it were before a sword, when none pursueth: and ye shall have no power to stand before your enemies.

verses.geez: ወትጠፍኡ ፡ በውስተ ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ ወትውሕጠክሙ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ፀርክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall perish among the Gentiles, and the land of your enemies shall devour you.
translations.kjv: And ye shall perish among the heathen, and the land of your enemies shall eat you up.

verses.geez:
ወእለ ፡ ተርፉኒ ፡ እምኔክሙ ፡ ይደመሰሱ ፡ በእንተ ፡ ኀጣይኢሆሙ ፡ ወበእንተ ፡ ኀጣይአ ፡ አበዊሆሙ ፡ ይትመሰዉ ፡
                  በምድረ ፡ ፀሮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And those who are left of you shall perish, because of their sins, and because of the sins of their fathers: in the land of their enemies shall they consume away.
translations.kjv: And they that are left of you shall pine away in their iniquity in your enemies’ lands; and also in the iniquities of their fathers shall they pine away with them.

verses.geez: ወያየድዑ ፡ ኀጣይኦሙ ፡ ወኀጣይአ ፡ አበዊሆሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ክሕዱኒ ፡ ወተዐወሩኒ ፡ ወከመ ፡ ሖሩ ፡ ግድመ ፡ በቅድሜየ ።

translations.lxx: And they shall confess their sins, and the sins of their fathers, that they have transgressed and neglected me, and that they have walked perversely before me,
translations.kjv: If they shall confess their iniquity, and the iniquity of their fathers, with their trespass which they trespassed against me, and that also they have walked contrary unto me;

verses.geez:
ወአነኒ ፡ ሖርኩ ፡ ምስሌሆሙ ፡ ግድመ ፡ በመዐት ፡ ወአጥፍኦሙ ፡ በምድረ ፡ ፀሮሙ ፡ ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ይትኀፈር ፡ ልቦሙ
                  ፡ ዘኢኮነ ፡ ግዙረ ፡ ወይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ይገንዩ ፡ ለኀጣይኢሆሙ ።

translations.lxx: and I walked with them with a perverse mind; and I will destroy them in the land of their enemies: then shall their uncircumcised heart be ashamed, and then shall they acquiesce in the punishment of their sins.
translations.kjv: And that I also have walked contrary unto them, and have brought them into the land of their enemies; if then their uncircumcised hearts be humbled, and they then accept of the punishment of their iniquity:

verses.geez:
ወእዜከር ፡ ኪዳንየ ፡ ዘምስለ ፡ ያዕቆብ ፡ ወኪዳንየ ፡ ዘምስለ ፡ ይስሐቅ ፡ ወኪዳንየ ፡ ዘምስለ ፡ አብርሃም ፡ እዜከር
                  ፡ ወለምድርኒ ፡ እዜከራ ።

translations.lxx: And I will remember the covenant of Jacob, and the covenant of Isaac, and the covenant of Abraam will I remember.
translations.kjv: Then will I remember my covenant with Jacob, and also my covenant with Isaac, and also my covenant with Abraham will I remember; and I will remember the land.

verses.geez:
ወትትኀደግ ፡ ምድር ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ትትወከፍ ፡ ምድር ፡ ሰንበቲሃ ፡ ሶበ ፡ ተማሰነት ፡ በእንቲአሆሙ ፡
                  ወእሙንቱኒ ፡ ይትወከፉ ፡ ኀጣይኢሆሙ ፡ እስመ ፡ ተዐወሩ ፡ ኵነኔየ ፡ ወተቈጥዐት ፡ ነፍሶሙ ፡ ትእዛዝየ ።

translations.lxx: And I will remember the land, and the land shall be left of them; then the land shall enjoy her sabbaths, when it is deserted through them: and they shall accept the punishment of their iniquities, because they neglected my judgments, and in their soul loathed my ordinances.
translations.kjv: The land also shall be left of them, and shall enjoy her sabbaths, while she lieth desolate without them: and they shall accept of the punishment of their iniquity: because, even because they despised my judgments, and because their soul abhorred my statutes.

verses.geez:
ወአኮ ፡ እንዘ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ጸላእቶሙ ፡ ዘተዐወርክዎሙ ፡ ወኢተቈጣዕክዎሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ አጥፍኦሙ ፡ እስመ ፡
                  ኀዶጉ ፡ ኪዳንየ ፡ ዘኀቤሆሙ ፡ እንዘ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላኮሙ ።

translations.lxx: And yet not even thus, while they were in the land of their enemies, did I overlook them, nor did I loathe them so as to consume them, to break my covenant made with them; for I am the Lord their God.
translations.kjv: And yet for all that, when they be in the land of their enemies, I will not cast them away, neither will I abhor them, to destroy them utterly, and to break my covenant with them: for I am the LORD their God.

verses.geez:
ተዘኪርየ ፡ ኪዳኖሙ ፡ ዘቀዳሚ ፡ ዘአመ ፡ አውፃእክዎሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ምድረ ፡ ግብጽ ፡ እምቤተ ፡ ቅኔት ፡ እንዘ ፡ ይሬኢ
                  ፡ አሕዛብ ፡ ከመ ፡ እኩኖሙ ፡ አምላኮሙ ፡ አነ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ።

translations.lxx: And I will remember their former covenant, when I brought them out of the land of Egypt, out of the house of bondage before the nations, to be their God; I am the Lord.
translations.kjv: But I will for their sakes remember the covenant of their ancestors, whom I brought forth out of the land of Egypt in the sight of the heathen, that I might be their God: I am the LORD.

verses.geez:
ዝንቱ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ትእዛዝ ፡ ወኵነኔ ፡ ወሕግ ፡ ዘወሀበ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ማእከሎ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡
                  በደብረ ፡ ሲና ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደ ፡ ሙሴ ።

translations.lxx: These are my judgments and my ordinances, and the law which the Lord gave between himself and the children of Israel, in the mount Sina, by the hand of Moses.
translations.kjv: These are the statutes and judgments and laws, which the LORD made between him and the children of Israel in mount Sinai by the hand of Moses.
